seoTitle: Moculta vs Modbury Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moculta and Modbury Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Moculta vs Modbury Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moculta and Modbury Heights.
heading: Moculta vs Modbury Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moculta, South Australia and Modbury Heights, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moculta has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Modbury Heights (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moculta or Modbury Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moculta has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Modbury Heights scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moculta scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Modbury Heights scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moculta or Modbury Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moculta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
